Compliance.description: VAT/SARS compliant (VAT201 reports, audit files), SA-localized; no FSCA req'd. Strong record.

Customer Satisfaction.description: Trustpilot 4.1/5, Capterra 4.4/5; SA users praise SA-specific features.

Product Value.description: Free for <R1M rev; paid R199-R799/mo incl all features.

Innovation.description: AI assistant Zia, automated workflows, multi-currency, API, mobile, integrations (Zoho suite).

Customer Support.description: 24/7 support, SA phone/email/chat; praised in reviews.

Accessibility & Security.description: 2FA, role-based access, GDPR/POPIA compliant, end-to-end encryption. No data breaches.

pricing.name: Pricing
pricing.cost: Pricing: Free (<R1M); Standard R199/mo; Professional R399/mo; Premium R699/mo; Elite R799/mo

socialSentiment.summary: Positive on Capterra/Trustpilot; SA users highlight compliance/value; minor setup complaints.
